metadata.title: Fine-Tuning Language Models with Just Forward Passes

figures.description: OPT-13B performance on classification, multiple-choice, and generation tasks comparing Zero-shot, ICL, MeZO and FT.
Memory consumption of different-sized OPT models showing MeZO uses significantly less memory than FT.

sections.title: MeZO Algorithm
content: Classical results: ZO slows down bynumber of parameters d.
Our case:fine-tuninga pre-trained model with aprompt, so fine-tuning looks like pre-training!
Then:effective rank of Hessian ris small, convergence rates depend on r instead of d (descent lemma).

tables.description: MeZO Algorithm pseudocode showing the use of random seeds to minimize memory overhead.
Main results table for OPT-13B across classification, multiple-choice, and generation tasks.
Performance of MeZO on OPT 30B and 66B models.
MeZO performance on non-differentiable objectives like Accuracy/F1.

figures.description: RoBERTa-large results across various tasks comparing MeZO with Zero-shot, ICL, and FT.
